subject: A cloaked attacker lunging from the left with a curved bladed weapon at a robed figure on the right who is reeling backward as if struck, blood or dark mist trailing between them
description: Two figures clash in a dark, blood-toned scene. On the left, a hooded attacker in dark robes leans forward aggressively, arm extended with a curved blade or claw-like weapon that cuts toward the opponent. On the right, a figure in pale greenish-grey robes recoils, head thrown back, body bent backward in pain or shock. A streak of dark red — blood, or perhaps siphoned essence — arcs between them, reinforcing the predatory drain implied by the card's title. The background is murky and indistinct, dominated by deep reds, charcoal, and muted greens, with no clear architecture or horizon — the violence fills the frame.
foreground: two figures locked in a violent strike, blade or claw connecting, blood arc between them
background: indistinct murky haze of red and dark grey, suggesting smoke, void, or splattered atmosphere
emotion: attacker: focused aggression and hunger; victim: pain, recoil, helpless arch backward
